data.title: Inspire Investing Announces Lower Expense Ratios on 5 Faith-Based ETFs
data.description: In Boise, Idaho, on April 28, 2026, Inspire Investing announced expense ratio cuts on five of its exchange traded funds. The reductions vary from 2.7% to 7.6%, resulting in an average decrease of 5.3%. This fee reduction comes from the leading provider of Christian ETFs, marking a significant cost-saving measure for investors.

data.title: GM releases 2026 first-quarter results, declares quarterly dividend
data.description: On April 28, 2026, General Motors disclosed its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, with a revenue of $43.6 billion, net income attributable to stockholders amounting to $2.6 billion, and EBIT-adjusted reaching $4.3 billion. As a result, the company is revising its full-year 2026 EBIT adjusted guidance upwards.

data.title: GoldMining Announces Updated PEA Highlighting $1.0 Billion After-Tax NPV and 32% IRR at La Mina Project, Colombia
data.description: In a recent announcement, GoldMining Inc. (TSX: GOLD) (NYSE American: GLDG) revealed the findings of a revised preliminary economic assessment ("PEA") concerning the La Mina Project. This project, situated in Vancouver, BC, showcases promising outcomes for the company. The details of the PEA offer insights into the financial prospects of the La Mina Project, presenting a comprehensive overview of the projected economic viability. This development marks a significant milestone for GoldMining Inc. and underscores the potential opportunities associated with the Project.

data.title: NACCO INDUSTRIES ANNOUNCES DATES OF 2026 FIRST QUARTER EARNINGS RELEASE AND CONFERENCE CALL
data.description: On April 28, 2026, NACCO Industries® announced that they will disclose their financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 after the market closes on May 5, 2026. Following this announcement, the company will conduct a conference call on May 6, 2026. NACCO Industries® can be found on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NC.

data.title: HYSTER-YALE ANNOUNCES DATES OF FIRST QUARTER 2026 EARNINGS RELEASE AND WEBCAST
data.description: On April 28, 2026, Hyster-Yale, Inc. (NYSE: HY) revealed plans to disclose its First Quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market closing on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. Besides, the Company intends to conduct a webcast for the financial sector in association with the announcement.

data.title: NEVADA KING DOUBLES PHASE 4 DRILL PROGRAM TO 40,000 METRES, PROVIDES ASSAY RESULTS FROM SILVER PARK, AND A PROJECT WIDE PERMITTING UPDATE
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on April 28, 2026, Nevada King Gold Corp. announced significant progress in its exploration and permitting efforts at the Atlanta Gold Mine Project. The company, traded as NKG on the TSXV and NKGFF on the OTCQB, owns 100% of the 130km2 project. This update marks a positive step forward for Nevada King as it continues to advance its operations in the mining sector.

data.title: Immunic Appoints Accomplished Biopharmaceutical Executive Michael A. Panzara, M.D., M.P.H., as Chief Medical Officer
data.description: An established expert in developing neurology drugs, credited with creating multiple sclerosis treatments – with a track record of driving late-stage clinical projects and securing worldwide regulatory green lights, crucial for advancing Vidofludimus Calcium in pivotal stages.

data.title: USA Roller Chain Shares Timeline of Mechanical Power Transmission from Early Aviation to Modern Automation
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, on April 28, 2026, USA Roller Chain unveiled a comprehensive retrospective focusing on the significance of roller chains and mechanical power transmission systems throughout over 100 years of advancements. This historical overview showcases the evolution of these technologies, tracing their impact from early aviation milestones to the modern era of automation and beyond. The extensive analysis covers a wide array of developments and innovations, underscoring the enduring relevance and importance of roller chains in various industries.

data.title: Security Leaders Cite AI as a Risk Multiplier for APIs in New Akamai Survey
data.description: As the adoption of AI technology increases, so do the number of API attacks and incident costs. The surge in these types of attacks has been alarming, with reports showing a significant spike in both the frequency and cost of incidents related to APIs. This trend has raised concerns within the industry about the security risks associated with AI adoption. Observers noted a notable increase in the number of API attacks, as well as a substantial rise in the costs incurred as a result of such incidents. The correlation between the adoption of AI technology and the rise in API attacks indicates a pressing need for enhanced security measures to safeguard against these threats.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet Announces Chief Financial Officer Transition
data.description: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc., a prominent global medical technology leader, revealed that Suketu Upadhyay, Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President, Finance, will be departing. Paul Stellato has been appointed as the Interim CFO. This announcement was made on April 28, 2026, in Warsaw, Ind. Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. is listed on both the NYSE and SIX exchanges under the ticker symbol ZBH.
GENERAL MOTORS SEES FY ADJ EPS $11.50 TO $13.50, SAW $11 TO $13

data.title: Transatlantic Investment Group Announces €50 Billion AI Data Center and Innovation Campus in Croatia — the Largest Investment in Croatian History and Among the Largest Private U.S. Investments in Europe
data.description: Pantheon Atlas LLC, an investment group led by transatlantic partners, unveiled plans for Pantheon AI, a large AI data center and innovation campus to be built in Topusko, Croatia. The facility will adhere to NVIDIA GW-Scale AI factory standards and is expected to attract over €50 billion in total investments to the country. This initiative aims to position Croatia as a prominent hub for digital infrastructure in Central Europe, addressing a crucial capacity shortage in the region.

data.title: Applied Industrial Technologies Reports Fiscal 2026 Third Quarter Results
data.description: In Cleveland, Applied Industrial Technologies (NYSE: AIT), a prominent distributor and provider of industrial solutions, released their fiscal 2026 third-quarter results ended on March 31, 2026. They reported net sales of $1.3 billion for the quarter, showing a 7.3% growth compared to the previous year. This increase comprises a 0.5% contribution from acquisitions and a favorable 0.8% boost from foreign operations.

data.title: Omnicell reveals Q1 2026 financial performance.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past ten months. This positive trend suggests that the labor market is gradually recovering from the impact of the pandemic. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding the initial projections. The increase in job creation is a promising sign for economic growth and stability. Experts believe that the current trajectory indicates a strengthening job market and a potential return to pre-pandemic employment levels in the near future.

data.title: Canada plans to prohibit crypto-based political donations with Bill C-25 for transparency; aims to tackle foreign influence. Lawmakers seek stricter finance regulations.
data.description: In Canada, Bill C-25 is seeking to prohibit cryptocurrency political contributions due to worries regarding transparency and foreign meddling. Officials are advocating for tighter regulations on election financing in order to address these concerns.

data.title: Mercuryo Brings Off-Ramps to BitMEX, Launches 50% Discount Offer
data.description: In London on April 28, 2026, the global payments infrastructure platform, Mercuryo, revealed the introduction of crypto-to-fiat off-ramps in partnership with BitMEX, a leading cryptocurrency exchange. This collaboration allows users of BitMEX to seamlessly convert their digital tokens into fiat currencies. This move aims to provide increased flexibility and accessibility to users, tapping into the growing popularity of digital assets.

data.title: Trip.com Group Filed 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Today, Trip.com Group Limited (Nasdaq: TCOM; HKEX: 9961), a prominent travel service provider offering accommodation booking, transportation ticketing, packaged tours, and corporate travel management, made a significant announcement in Singapore on April 28, 2026. The company, known for its comprehensive travel solutions, continues to establish itself as a leader in the industry.
